Aider polyglot code-editing benchmark (225 exercises across 6 languages, diff-edit format), 'o3-pro (high)' config; ranks 3rd behind GPT-5 variants. Independently cross-corroborated with an identical 84.9 figure on DataLearner's agent leaderboard (datalearner.com/en/leaderboards/category/agent).

verificationNotes: Confirmed real. TechCrunch (fetched) confirms June 10, 2025 launch, ChatGPT Pro/Team + API availability, and $20/$80 per-1M pricing verbatim. developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/o3-pro confirms 200K context / 100K max output. Fetched binaryverseai.com directly and confirmed all three claimed numbers appear verbatim on the page: AIME 2024 '93 percent,' GPQA Diamond '84 percent,' Codeforces '2,748 points.' No changes made.
